author: DanTDM
text:
I Am Scared Of The Ocean.. (Subnautica 2)
SUBSCRIBE NOW
In this DanTDM gaming video, I'm playing the brand new Subnautica 2 game! The original Subnautica was one of the most popular series on this channel so let's see if the second one is as good.

Game name: Subnautica 2

Edited by: Me, DanTDM
